cobblemon.species.woolipup.name: Woolipup
cobblemon.species.woolipup.desc: This simple Pokémon believes Wooloo and Mareep to be one of its own. It is known to challenge opponents twice its size to protect its herd.
cobblemon.species.lupelt.name: Lupelt
cobblemon.species.lupelt.desc: It is loyal to a fault, and it will never back down from a fight. Its wool builds up so fast that it struggles to move after a long time without being sheared.
cobblemon.species.nitkick.name: Nitkick
cobblemon.species.nitkick.desc: While both a powerful and clever Pokémon, its unruly behavior makes it difficult to train. If it weren't so lazy, it'd achieve great things.
cobblemon.species.anonkey.name: Anonkey
cobblemon.species.anonkey.desc: It destroys everything in its path in equal measure. There is no reason apart from its natural drive to deliver chaos unto the world. A well-placed kick from one of its hooves could send even a snorlax flying.
cobblemon.species.pumpkid.name: Pumpkid
cobblemon.species.pumpkid.desc: This Pokémon is known to care for the crops of farmers. It is commonly seen sunbathing.
cobblemon.species.gallagourd.name: Gallagourd
cobblemon.species.gallagourd.desc: This Pokémon protects weaker Pokémon from their predators. If it is ever separated from its iron suit, it returns to being a Pumpkid.
cobblemon.species.pumpkit.name: Pumpkit
cobblemon.species.pumpkit.desc: This Pokémon hides in pumpkin patches, waiting for bird Pokémon to land nearby. It is commonly mistaken for Pumpkid, causing it to be often mistakenly taken in.
cobblemon.species.gallowgourd.name: Gallowgourd
cobblemon.species.gallowgourd.desc: It is ruthless in how it delivers its twisted justice. It is commonly mistaken for Gallagourd, and the two Pokémon have an intense rivalry. Gallagourd goes as far as protecting villainous Pokémon from Gallowgourd's vices.
cobblemon.species.parropot.name: Parropot
cobblemon.species.parropot.desc: An ancient Pokémon, it searches for objects to put in its head. The reason is unknown.
cobblemon.species.parropot-honeypot.desc: An ancient Pokémon, the honey in its head puts nearby Bug-type Pokémon in a trance.
cobblemon.species.parropot-flowerpot.des: An ancient Pokémon, the flower in its head is always in bloom no matter the weather.
cobblemon.species.parropot-candle.desc: An ancient Pokémon, the candle in its head never goes out, no matter how hard one may try.
cobblemon.species.parropot-quill.desc: An ancient Pokémon, the quill in its head is always flowing, even when the wind is still.
cobblemon.species.bruital.name: Bruital
cobblemon.species.bruital.desc: It carves the icicle in its hand obsessively. The toxins from its wildberry diet makes this Pokémon poisonous to consume by would-be predators.
cobblemon.species.shivor.name: Shivor
cobblemon.species.shivor.desc: This persistent Pokémon will stalk prey for days, waiting for the perfect moment to strike, moving faster than one would first think. It prepares its meals methodically using the sharp icicle it carries.
cobblemon.species.siphosail.name: Siphosail
cobblemon.species.siphosail.desc: It sails across the ocean, stealing all it can from reefs. A group of Siphosail is called a fleet.
cobblemon.species.serasea.name: Serasea
cobblemon.species.serasea.desc: It gently drifts in the dark depths. Spotting a Serasea in open waters is considered a bad omen.
cobblemon.species.cephcery.name: Cephcery
cobblemon.species.cephcery.desc: A devious Pokémon, it confuses its prey by shifting the colors on its body. It utilizes forbidden powers from worlds beyond.
cobblemon.species.cephcery-gmax.desc: It has become a projection for a forbidden presence. Looking at it for too long can cause one to lose their mind.
cobblemon.species.ocatalyst.name: Ocatalyst
cobblemon.species.ocatalyst.desc: It uses the alchemical flask on its tail to brew strange concoctions from berries. It's surpisingly sanitary despite being a Poison-type.
cobblemon.species.ocatalyst-mega.desc: Upon Mega-evolution its tail has grown large enough to hold gallons of its concoction. It blasts the strange liquid in an arc, with a range as far as the horizon.
cobblemon.species.gourmooze.name: Gourmooze
cobblemon.species.gourmooze.desc: It absorbs nutrients into its body directly through its gelatinous skin, becoming more powerful in the process. It is exceptionally difficult to satisfy its unique tastes in food.
cobblemon.species.souslag.name: Souslag
cobblemon.species.souslag.desc: It travels far and wide in search for the best ingredients to cook with. While having a short temper, it is quite satisfied when its food is enjoyed by others. It is said this Pokémon taught humanity how to preserve food using ice in ancient times.
cobblemon.species.snowbrawl.name: Snowbrawl
cobblemon.species.snowbrawl.desc: It intentionally places itself in inconvenient places to provoke fights. It attempts to defeat as many opponents as possible before it melts in the winter. It would rather go out fighting than meet such a fate.
cobblemon.species.ghasp.name: Ghasp
cobblemon.species.ghasp.desc: This weak Pokémon seems to struggle to breathe properly, but helium seems to aid its affliction.
cobblemon.species.ghasthma.name: Ghasthma
cobblemon.species.ghasthma.desc: It has taken its last breath, and it now wanders taking the air from the lungs of others. It seems to be in a constant state of discomfort.
cobblemon.species.elatephyr.name: Elatephyr
cobblemon.species.elatephyr.desc: While it still has breathing problems, they have diminished, allowing it to live normally. It is acutely aware of weather patterns, and warns other Pokémon of upcoming meteorological disasters.
cobblemon.species.icken.name: Icken
cobblemon.species.icken.desc: It is repulsive to most Pokémon, leaving it with no predators. It is surprisingly intelligent.
cobblemon.species.cluckenstein.name: Cluckenstein
cobblemon.species.cluckenstein.desc: It is reckless in behavior, often injuring those around it during its experiments. Once it decides on a task, its determination to see it through is unbreakable.
cobblemon.species.reanderthral.name: Reanderthral
cobblemon.species.reanderthral.desc: In an attempt to achieve immortality during evolution, the body gained a consciousness of its own. The original Pokémon still tries to command the newborn mind, to little effect.
cobblemon.species.reanderthral-mega.desc: Its two minds have achieved an enlightened symbiosis. They are perfectly in sync, and have become a perfect combination of brain and brawn. This connection immediately severs when the energy from Mega Evolution fades.
cobblemon.species.bowne.name: Bowne
cobblemon.species.bowne.desc: It carries a handcrafted bow of bone at all times. This Pokémon is never seen without it.
cobblemon.species.bognmarrow.name: Bognmarrow
cobblemon.species.bognmarrow.desc: It patrols its territory with a platoon of fellow Bognmarrow. Whichever one has the bigger cap is the squadron leader.
cobblemon.species.ivorice.name: Ivorice
cobblemon.species.ivorice.desc: While a solitary Pokémon, it sometimes hunts with Pokémon of similar cruelty, such as Weavile or Froslass. It always aims for the legs first to try to immobilize its prey.
cobblemon.species.withereign.name: Withereign
cobblemon.species.withereign.desc: This sinister Pokémon absorbs the souls of both its enemies and allies to fuel its power. It dreams of world conquest.
cobblemon.species.withereign-mega.desc: Its destructive power has been multiplied by Mega Evolution. Now nothing can stop its quest of world domination.
cobblemon.species.tormniac.name: Tormniac
cobblemon.species.tormniac.desc: Despite its dreadful appearance, it is quite cordial. It consumes the nightmares of others, leading to a peaceful sleep.
cobblemon.species.shellin.name: Shellin
cobblemon.species.shellin.desc: It hides in its iridescent shell, firing a poisonous needle when threatened. It hates interacting with others, and becomes easily irritated in crowded places.
cobblemon.species.cerebug.name: Cerebug
cobblemon.species.cerebug.desc: While weak on its own, in a group, they are terrifyingly efficient. It feeds on the energy of other Pokémon like a parasite.
cobblemon.species.foocoon.name: Foocoon
cobblemon.species.foocoon.desc: Cerebug temporarily incubate as Foocoon in order to achieve a powerful form. Those close to emerging gain the power to telepathically command Cerebug, like leaders of an army.
cobblemon.species.iotlander.name: Iotlander
cobblemon.species.iotlander.desc: The leader of a Cerebug colony, over which it rules with absolute authority. It is believed this Pokémon came from another dimension in order to drain our world from its life energy.
cobblemon.species.iotlander-mega.desc: It has become an exceptional strategist. It commands other Iotlander, alongside their colonies, on long military campaigns of expansion.
cobblemon.species.decayed.name: Decayed
cobblemon.species.decayed.desc: This mythical Pokémon decays anything it touches. It it said this Pokémon was created by Zygarde to counteract Xerneas.
cobblemon.species.decayed-rejuv.desc: This Mythical Pokémon rejuvenates anything it touches. It it said this Pokémon was created by Zygarde to counteract Yveltal.
cobblemon.species.jesteratus.name: Jesteratus
cobblemon.species.jesteratus.desc: The machinery in its body is beyond current technological advancements. It has the ability to alter space-time, but usually on accident. It is said it was made in ancient times by extraterrestrials.
cobblemon.species.jesteratus-gmax.desc: Being in its vacinity causes one to age rapidly. It is aware of all possible timelines.
cobblemon.species.hullet.name: Hullet
cobblemon.species.hullet.desc: As soon as its born, rock fragments begin to cling to its body. It fuses with the minerals in the stone to create the ultimate armor to protect itself from predators.
cobblemon.species.ordnaland.name: Ordnaland
cobblemon.species.ordnaland.desc: Its hydrophobic skin allows it to glide effortlessly through the water. The lasers it shoots from its eyes can track even the fastest of targets.
cobblemon.species.rapscam.name: Rapscam
cobblemon.species.rapscam.desc: Communities of this Pokémon trade leaves for food like a form of currency. The more lush the leaf, the higher the value.
cobblemon.species.prodifry.name: Prodifry
cobblemon.species.prodifry.desc: Its natural talent for combat makes it a popular Pokémon. As soon as they're born they travel across the ocean to train.
cobblemon.species.salvior.name: Salvior
cobblemon.species.salvior.desc: Reaching a new height of power, it journeys the world in search of powerful opponents. It has an indominable spirit.
cobblemon.species.salsei.name: Salsei
cobblemon.species.salsei.desc: Now old, it desires peace and tranquility, however the fighting spirit lives on. It teaches Pokémon it sees having potential how to effectively use their moves.
cobblemon.species.salsei-mega.desc: Regaining a part of its youth upon Mega-Evolution. It dispatches foes with blistering power and speed of its prime, now with the wisdom of it's years.
cobblemon.species.dromedust.name: Dromedust
cobblemon.species.dromedust.desc: It is uncomfortable with its own appearance. It often hides in objects to be more appealing.
cobblemon.species.sewsand.name: Sewsand
cobblemon.species.sewsand.desc: After finding a crude doll it has becomes Sewsand. It is constantly patchworking its body in order to find the perfect form. It is quite the perfectionist.
cobblemon.species.cuddelavee.name: Cuddelavee
cobblemon.species.cuddelavee.desc: It has become its true self, flaws and all. It has realized to accept itself, while still moving forward toward what it strives to be. It hates getting wet.
cobblemon.move.badinput.desc: This move inflicts physical or special damage, whichever will be more effective. The user distorts the fabric of reality, randomizing its type in the process.
cobblemon.move.blastospore.desc: The user explodes in a cloud of spores to inflict damage on adjacent foes. The user faints upon using this move.
cobblemon.move.blunderpowder.desc: The user fires a muddy musket ball at the target. The spore powder damages Pokémon next to the target as well.
cobblemon.move.dealer.desc: The user shuffles the items of every Pokémon, randomly giving each of them a new item amongst those on the field.
cobblemon.move.eldereye.desc: The user fires a crystalline beam of energy at the target. In rain, it also electrifies the target's next move.
cobblemon.move.fester.desc: The user feasts on the target's natural energies. This move always hits and raises Attack if the target is a Psychic, Dark or Grass-type.
cobblemon.move.frostbolt.desc: The user fires a crossbow bolt of ice at the target's weak points. This may leave the target paralyzed.
cobblemon.move.mishap.desc: The user spills a strange brew on the target to confuse it. However, this also sharply raises the target’s Speed stat.
cobblemon.move.overcharge.desc: The user overcharges its joints, battering the target. If its partner is an Electric-type, a random stat of that Pokémon is raised. Cannot be used twice in a row.
cobblemon.move.rapidfire.desc: The user fires three sand projectiles in quick succession. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit, and may burn and flinch the target.
cobblemon.move.siphon.desc: This move inflicts physical or special damage, whichever will be more effective. The user's HP will be restored by a portion of the damage dealt. If the user is at full hp, instead of healing it will summon grassy terrain.
cobblemon.battle.activate.siphon: %1$s's overabundance of energy summoned grassy terrain!
cobblemon.move.soulfireblade.desc: The user slashes the target with a blade of soulfire. This may leave the target with a burn.
cobblemon.move.treefell.desc: The user attacks by hacking at the target with a blade. This move is super effective on Grass-type Pokémon.
cobblemon.move.whiplash.desc: The user whips the target with high speed winds. This move always goes first and is boosted if used in Tailwind.
cobblemon.battle.activate.whiplash: The move was boosted by the flowing winds!
cobblemon.move.asphyxiate.desc: The user attacks by drawing in the air from the target. This move also lifts the effects of Tailwind from the opposing side. Also prevents the target from using moves that emit sound for two turns.
cobblemon.move.backburn.desc: The user snuffs out the target with its own flames. This move is super effective on Fire-type Pokémon.
cobblemon.move.allornothing.desc: The user heroically slams the target with their steely body. This also damages the user quite a lot.
cobblemon.move.cleave.desc: The user snuffs makes a wide swipe its blade toward opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Speed stats.
cobblemon.move.splinteredaxe.desc: The user slashes the target with a splintered axe. If the target is knocked out by this move, it lays two layers of spikes.
cobblemon.move.gmaxbizarre.desc: A Psychic-type attack that Gigantamax Cephcery use. This move makes opponents only able to use attacking moves for a short time.
cobblemon.move.gmaxcountdown.desc: A Fairy-type attack that Gigantamax Jesteratus use. This move twists the dimensions, in which slower Pokémon get to move first for five turns.
cobblemon.move.gmaxlament.desc: A Ghost-type attack that Gigantamax Plangiant use. This moves prevents opponents from restoring HP.
cobblemon.move.venombinding.desc: The target is badly poisoned, and cannot flee or switch out.
cobblemon.move.chaoskick.desc: The user kicks the target to tear down all they've built. Removes all of the target's stat changes.
cobblemon.ability.anarchist.desc: This Pokémon's Sp. Def is raised but prevents the use of status moves
cobblemon.move.absolutestrike.desc: In this two-turn attack, the user centers itself and boosts its Sp. Def stat, then attacks the target on the next turn.
cobblemon.ability.anomaly.desc: While this Pokémon is on the field, type interactions are reversed.
cobblemon.battle.activate.anomaly: %1$s twisted reality! Type matchups have been reversed!
cobblemon.ability.appetite.desc: When this Pokémon eats a berry, it transforms into its Obese form.
cobblemon.ability.brainworm.desc: The Pokémon adds the Psychic type to any attacker that makes direct contact with it.
cobblemon.ability.culinary.desc: Doubles the effects of berries consumed by allies.
cobblemon.ability.darksorcery.desc: The Pokémon's Psychic-type moves can hit Dark-type Pokémon
cobblemon.ability.determination.desc: When this Pokémon would be knocked out, it is instead left with 1 HP. However, it immediately faints once the current turn is over.
cobblemon.ability.dragonheart.desc: This Pokémon's Dragon-type moves are boosted and have a chance to flinch while Psychic Terrain is active.
cobblemon.ability.lastgrasp.desc: The Pokémon gains more health from sources of recovery. If Grassy Terrain is active, the Pokémon rejuvenates and achieves its true form.
cobblemon.ability.maritime.desc: In rain, this Pokémon's Rock-type moves are boosted and cannot miss.
cobblemon.ability.mentor.desc: Damaging 2-turn moves used by the Pokémon and its allies occur in a single turn instead.
cobblemon.battle.activate.mentor.self: %1$s uses a technique to speed up the process!
cobblemon.ability.neurotoxin.desc: Pokémon poisoned by the user's moves will also have their Speed stat lowered.
cobblemon.ability.oxidize.desc: When hit by a Water or Electric-type move, this Pokémon envelops itself in a veil made of energy and regains some HP every turn.
cobblemon.ability.savagery.desc: Instead of being confused, a random stat is raised.
cobblemon.ability.silvertongue.desc: This Pokémon's Steel-type moves may lower the target's speed.
cobblemon.ability.sirenscall.desc: The Pokémon draws in all Ghost-type moves. Instead of taking damage from them, its Sp. Def stat is boosted.
cobblemon.ability.echochamber.desc: While this Pokémon is on the field, Sound-based moves deal increased damage the more turns they are used in a row.
cobblemon.ability.climatechange.desc: When this Pokémon switches in, it cycles any primary weathers active into another.
cobblemon.ability.frostfist.desc: This Pokémon's punching moves have a chance to freeze.
cobblemon.ability.toxicbody.desc: Making contact with this Pokémon has a chance to badly poison the attacker.
cobblemon.ability.heroism.desc: This Pokémon's moves are dynamically boosted the more damaged this Pokémon is.
cobblemon.ability.executioner.desc: This Pokémon's moves are dynamically boosted against damaged targets. Healthy targets take reduced damage.
cobblemon.ability.fragmentation.desc: Scatters stealth rock at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.
cobblemon.ability.mortar.desc: Powers up some ball and bomb moves.
cobblemon.ability.timewarp.desc: If Trick Room is active when this Pokémon enters the field, its Speed is harshly lowered and renews the Trick Room's timer.
cobblemon.ability.houserules.desc: The Pokémon creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon’s held items lose their effects on switch in.
cobblemon.ability.woundlicker.desc: At the end of every turn this Pokémon licks the wounds of its partner, which slowly and steadily recovers its HP.
cobblemon.ability.dreamcatcher.desc: The Pokémon feeds on the dreams of the Pokémon it damages, healing HP equal to a fraction of the damage dealt.
